use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in web applications
Form submission triggers with multiple visual variants
Accessible interactive elements with keyboard navigation support
Icon buttons for toolbar and navigation interfaces
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning confirmations
ai_summary: A reusable button component built with Radix UI Slot for flexible composition and class-variance-authority (CVA) for managing multiple style variants and sizes. Implements shadcn/ui design patterns with clean Tailwind utility classes, providing 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options. Includes proper focus-visible states and ring utilities for accessibility, serving as a foundational atomic UI element across various industry applications.
